reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
🐶개사원후기🐶
바스락+삑삑이+바이트 스팟까지
귀여운 인형에 많은 기능이 있어서 너무 좋아요!

크기도 커서 물고 흔들기 좋아요!
주자마자 자꾸 놀아달라고 가져와요🩵
reviews.content_en:
🐶Dog Employee Review🐶
Crinkle + squeak + bite spot all in one!
So many features packed into this cute plush - I love it!

The size is nice and big, perfect for biting and shaking!
He keeps bringing it to me asking to play right after I give it to him 🩵

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
납작해서 소형견 강쥐도 잘 갖고 놀더라구요!
삑삑 바스락 다 있어서 오랫동안 흥미롭게 잘 갖고 놀아서 좋은 거 같아요 추천합니당🤍
reviews.content_en:
It's flat so even my small pup and aggressive chewer can carry it around well!
Has both squeaks and crinkles so he's entertained and plays with it for a long time - definitely recommend! 🤍

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content: 애착인형으로 좋아요!! 올해 출시된 장난감 중에 제일 귀여운 것 같아요🐄 몽당친구들 시리즈 계속 나오길!!!
reviews.content_en: Great as an attachment toy!! I think it's the cutest toy released this year 🐄 Hope the Chubby Friends series keeps coming out!!!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
저희 강쥐가 장난감에 진심인데 여기 물면 삑, 저기 물면 바스락 거리니까 너무 좋아해요ㅋㅋ 택 부분에 조그마한 간식도 넣어주니까 소만 물고 뜯네요ㅋㅋ

디자인도 너무 귀엽고 사이즈도 소형견이 물기에 너무 두껍거나 무겁지 않아서 터그놀이 하기에도 괜찮아요

쪼끄만게 지 얼굴보다 큰 장난감 가지고 노는게 너무 귀여워서 너무 만족합니다ㅋㅋ 역시 바잇미가 장난감들이 너무 귀여워요ㅋㅋ 이거 뜯어지면 기린으로도 구매할 의향이 있습니다
reviews.content_en:
My aggressive chewer is seriously obsessed with toys and she loves this because she gets different sounds - squeak when she bites one spot, crinkle when she bites another ㅋㅋ Since there's a little treat pocket in the tag, she's just gnawing on the tail ㅋㅋ

The design is so cute and the size isn't too thick or heavy for small dogs to bite, so it's great for tug play too.

I'm so satisfied watching my little pup play with a toy bigger than her face ㅋㅋ BITE ME toys are seriously adorable ㅋㅋ If this one gets destroyed, I'm definitely planning to buy the giraffe version

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
다양한 소리가 나서 강아지가 더 좋아하는것 같아요!
바스락 소리도 너무 신나하는 것 같고, 삑삑이도 안에 여러개라 같이 놀아줄때 물고있는 부분 말고 다른부분에서 소리를 들려 줄 수 있어 더 편해요!!
입이 작은 강아지한테도 잘 물수있는 부드러우 재질로 되어있고 튼튼해서 오래 가지고 놀 수 있을 것 같아요!!
reviews.content_en:
It makes so many different sounds that my dog loves it even more!
She gets so excited about the crinkle sound, and since there are multiple squeakers inside, when I play with her I can make sounds from different spots besides where she's biting - it's so convenient!!
It's made of soft material that even small-mouthed dogs can bite easily, and it's durable so she can play with it for a long time!!

reviews.name: 소****
reviews.content:
오랜만에 강아지가 빠져든 장난감이에요!
말랑부들한데 안에 삑삑이가 많이 들어있어서
다양하게 공략하면서 재밌게 놀았어요.
아기 장난감같이 귀여운건 덤 ㅠㅠ 
삑삑이 좋아하는 강아지들한테 완전 추천입니다!!
reviews.content_en:
It's a toy my dog has been really into in a long time!
It's soft and squishy with lots of squeakers inside so she has fun exploring different ways to play with it.
The cute baby toy-like design is a bonus ㅠㅠ
Absolutely recommend for dogs who love squeakers!!

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content:
이벤트 참여로 당첨이 되서
오늘 받아봤어요 삑삑이도 많이 들어있고
바스락도 귀랑 다리에 들어있어요
촉감도 보들보들하고 사이즈도 귀엽고 예뻐요
잘 가지고 놀게될거같아요 감사합니다
reviews.content_en:
I won the event and received it today! It has lots of squeakers and crinkles in the ears and legs too.
The texture is soft and the size is cute and pretty.
I think she'll have a lot of fun playing with it. Thank you!

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content:
개사원 동동이리뷰

아주 격렬하게 좋아하네요...
울 강쥐 택 뜯는거 좋아허는데 요고요고 택이 많아서 좋네욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ삑삑이도 많구,,
일단 귀여워서 견주맘에 탕탕 후루후루,,
강쥐도 좋고 견주도 좋고 굳굳👍🏻
reviews.content_en:
Employee Dog Dong-Dong's Review

He absolutely loves it...
My aggressive chewer loves to tear tags and this has so many tags ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ and lots of squeakers too,
First of all it's so cute the owner keeps going pitter-patter patter...
The dog loves it and the owner loves it too, all good 👍🏻

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
짱귀여워서 보자마자 결제했는데 생각보다 크기가 있더라고요!
덕분에 7kg 강아지가 입에 물고서 앞발 허우적허우적하지 않고 잘 잡고 갖고 놀아요😆

바스락바스락 소리 잘나서 좋은데 특히 마음에 드는건 주댕이 삑삑이입니닼ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 아이가 엄청 좋아해요👍👍
reviews.content_en:
It's so cute I paid for it right away, but it turned out to be bigger than I thought!
So my 7kg dog can hold it in his mouth without his front paws flailing around and plays with it really well 😆

The crinkle sound comes out great, but what I especially love is the main squeaker ㅋㅋㅋㅋ My pup loves it so much 👍👍

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
일단 너무 귀엽구.. 귀여워서 강지가 물고 다니면 더욱 귀여워요😍
뽁뽁이가 많아서 어딜 물어도 신이나는지 엄청 좋아해요!
크기도 생각보다 커서 놀기도 좋아요.
reviews.content_en:
It's so cute first of all.. and when my pup carries it around biting it, it's even cuter 😍
There's so much bubble/crinkle material that wherever he bites he gets excited and loves it so much!
The size is bigger than I thought so it's great for playing with too.

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
장난감 좋아하는 3개월 애기에게 선물했어요~!! 
염소랑 고민하다가 기린으로 했는데 두개다 살껄 ^^;;;
집어던지면서 너무 잘놀아요 !! 이러다가 바잇미장난감 
다사게생겼어요 ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 둘이서 서로 가지겠다고 싸워서 곧 한 개 더 주문할지도요…ㅎ 애들이 입에 딱 맞는 사이즈라 좋은가봐요 가지고 여기저기 다니면서 마구 물어뜯네요 마음에 쏙 드는 장난감이라 다행이에요!
reviews.content_en: The two of them are fighting over who gets to have it so I might order one more soon… It seems they love the size that fits perfectly in their mouths because they carry it everywhere biting and chewing on it. I'm so glad it's a toy they love!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 울 아리의 최애 장난감이 되버렸내요🥬🍓🫶🏻
reviews.content_en: It became my Ari's favorite toy 🥬🍓🫶🏻

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요! 부드럽고 삑삑이와 바스락이 다 있어서 너무 좋네요!🫶
reviews.content_en: It's so cute! It's soft and has both squeakers and crinkles - love it! 🫶

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
신나게 기린이랑 놀더니 역시 하루를 못버팀 
아직 조금뜯어져서 뜯어버리고 택두개로 요리조리 흔들고 삑삑거리고 잘노는중
reviews.content_en:
He was playing happily with the giraffe but couldn't last a day
It's starting to tear a bit so he's destroying it, playing with the two tags, shaking them around, squeaking, and playing well

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
울집 강아지가 너무 좋아합니다!
보통 인형은 잘 물어뜯어서 금방 못쓰게 되는데 이 인형은 내구성이 좋아서 아직도 잘 가지고 놀수 있어서 좋습니다!
reviews.content_en:
My dog loves this so much!
Usually with plush toys my pup tears them up and they're ruined quickly, but this one is so durable that he can still play with it well!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바잇미 장난감은 디자인이 다양해서 좋아요  세일하면 가성비도 좋고 강아지가 너무 좋아할 요소가 많아요
reviews.content_en: BITE ME toys have good variety in design. When they go on sale the value is great and there are so many things dogs love about them

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
울집 상전님께서 요 아이를 제일 조아하십니다~~   바스락 소리가 넘 조아요👍👍
다 사망하시면 또 구매하러 오겠습니당
reviews.content_en:
My pup absolutely adores this toy~~ The crinkle sound is so good 👍👍
When they're all destroyed I'll definitely come back to buy more

reviews.name: s****
reviews.content:
우앗!애기가 넘 좋아해여~삑삑이도 많이 들어있고 귀에는
바스락~택도 여러개 있어서 물어뜯고 갖고 놀기 좋아영 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Wow! My baby loves it so much~ There are lots of squeakers inside and the ears have crinkles~ and there are multiple tags too so it's great for biting, chewing and playing ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
소도 사줘야할까봐요 세탁하고 줄라고했는데 보자마자
신나서 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: I thought I'd have to get the cow too, I washed it and was going to give it back but he got so excited as soon as he saw it and loves it so much

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지들이 잘 갖고 놀고 생각보다 내구성이 좋아요 다음에다른 종류로 또 구매해볼 예정이에요
reviews.content_en: My dogs play with it well and it's more durable than I expected. I'm planning to buy other types next time

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 털이 안빠지고 바스락 소리 삑삑 소리도 잘 납니다. 마감도 괜찮아요.
reviews.content_en: The hair doesn't shed and the crinkle and squeak sounds come out well. The finish is nice too.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
크기 적당하고 잘 갖고 놀아요
기린 너무 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
The size is just right and he plays with it well
The giraffe is so cute ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
기린이랑 젖소랑 두개 샀는데 둘다 잘가지고 놀아요~
젖소를 더 좋아하는것 같기두 하고 기분대로 좋아하네요 ㅎㅎ 기린 물고오더니 옆에 모셔둡니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
I bought both the giraffe and the cow and he plays with both well~
Seems like he likes the cow more but he loves whatever depending on his mood ㅎㅎ He brings the giraffe and sets it aside next to him ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 이전에 사준것도 닳도록 아주 잘 가지고 놀았어요 디자인이 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: He played with the one I gave him before so much it got worn out. The design is cute!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
귀 엽 ㅠㅡㅠ🦒💛💛💛

삑삑이에 환장하는 강아지라
너무 좋아해요🫶
reviews.content_en:
Cute ㅠㅡㅠ 🦒 💛💛💛

My dog is obsessed with squeakers
so she loves it so much 🫶

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 바잇미 장난감 귀엽고 튼튼해서 좋아용
reviews.content_en: BITE ME toys are cute and durable, love it

reviews.name: 경****
reviews.content: 뾱뾱이가 3개나 들어있어 만지는 족족 소리나니 넘  좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: Since there are 3 squeakers inside, every time I touch it it makes sounds - so good!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 온지 하루만에 개박살이 났어요 ㅠㅠ 조만간 또 시킬게요...
reviews.content_en: It fell apart within a day of getting it ㅠㅠ I'll order again soon...

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 가격도 제품도 좋습니다!!~~^^
reviews.content_en: Great price and great product!!~~^^

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요. 강아지가 잘 가지고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: It's so cute. My dog loves playing with it.

reviews.name: 변****
reviews.content: 너무 귀여워요,, 제가 가져도 될까여,,?
reviews.content_en: It's so cute,, can I have one too,,?

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
기린 너무 귀엽고 사주면 좋아할거 같아서 구매했는데 역시나 좋아하고 잘 가지고 놀아요~
조금있으면 옆에 택 부분 뜯어질것 같네용,,,
reviews.content_en: The giraffe is so adorable and I thought my pup would love it, so I bought it - and sure enough, he does and plays with it well~ Though it looks like the tag on the side might tear off soon,,,

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
너무  이쁜 기린이라 바로 샀어요
전에 개구리도 잘 가지고 놀아서 이번 기린도 잘 놀거 같으네요~~
reviews.content_en: It's such a pretty giraffe that I bought it right away. Since my dog loved the frog toy before, I think he'll have fun with this giraffe too~~

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content:
사심을 담은 구매😅
삑삑이도 여러개 있고 택도 달려서 강쥐도 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: A purchase filled with selfish desires 😅 There are several squeakers and it comes with a tag, so my pup loves it too

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 장난감치고 비싸다 생각했는데 크기도 크고 삑삑이도 3개로 나누어져있네요? 잘가지고 놀아용 ㅎㅎ 중형견한테 딱 좋은 사이즈입니당
reviews.content_en: I thought it was pricey for a toy, but it's quite big and the squeaker is divided into 3 parts? My dog plays with it really well ㅎㅎ It's the perfect size for medium-sized dogs

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
귀여워요 
생각보다 큰데
애기가 잘 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: It's cute. It's bigger than I expected, but my pup plays with it well

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 빨랐어요. 강아지가 삑삑이 있는 장난감 넘 좋아해서 항상 바잇미에서 주문해요~ 여러가지 새로운 상품 많이 나왔으면 좋겠어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast. My dog loves toys with squeakers so I always order from BITE ME~ I hope they come out with lots of new products ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
애기가 너무 좋아해서 뿌듯해요.
다음에 기린으로 또 주문하고싶어요
reviews.content_en: I'm so happy because my pup loves it so much. I want to order the giraffe again next time

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 장난감이 찰떡 이에요!! 귀염뽀작 기린다리 쌍삑삑이 너무 좋아요!
reviews.content_en: The toy is perfect!! The adorable giraffe legs with dual squeakers are amazing!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무너무 좋아하고 하루종일 물고 있어서 빵꾸가 날 정도에요 ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much and chews on it all day long to the point it's getting holes ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 손****
reviews.content: 예상보다 우리 아이한테는 좀 크지만 한번씩 바스락 거리는 소리에 집중하며 가지고 노네요~
reviews.content_en: It's a bit bigger than expected for my pup, but he focuses on the crunching sound it makes and plays with it~

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
실물 보고 귀여워서 같이 시킨 인형이에용
애기가 좋아해요!
자기꺼인줄 귀신같이 잘압니다ㅎ
reviews.content_en: This plush toy came as an add-on because I thought it was cute when I saw it in person. My pup loves it! He knows it's his like magic ㅎ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 얼마나 버텨줄지 모르나 지금은 미친듯 가지고 놀아요
reviews.content_en: Not sure how long it'll last, but right now he's playing with it like crazy

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 두번째 구매에요! 선물로 구매했는데 너무 좋습니다
reviews.content_en: Second purchase! I bought it as a gift and it's amazing

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 저희집 댕이의 최애 장난감입니다~
reviews.content_en: It's my pup's favorite toy~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 바스락 시리즈를 너무 좋아해요!
reviews.content_en: I love the crinkle series so much!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 오늘도착보장 이라서 오늘 오전에 주문하고 저녁에 바로 받아봤어요
reviews.content_en: It said next-day delivery guaranteed, so I ordered in the morning and received it that evening

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 귀엽습니다 ^^ 소 인형은 잘 없는데 귀여워서 구매해봤어요.
reviews.content_en: It's cute ^^ Cow plushes aren't common, but it was so adorable I had to buy it.

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 강아지가 좋아해요. 배송 빠르구 잘 가지고 놀아요^^
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it. Shipping is fast and he plays with it really well^^
